articles.title: E20 rollout fuels demand for premium petrol amid mileage, engine concerns
articles.description: As E20 becomes the default fuel across India, a growing number of motorists are opting for higher-octane petrol amid concerns that E20 could hurt mileage and engine performance.

articles.title: A Week of Twists in US: From Highways to Headlines
articles.description: The week in the US was marked by diverse news events. Americans traveled despite high gas prices; Supreme Court Justice Barrett's decisions drew attention; a Tibetan man self-immolated for independence; Taylor Swift married Travis Kelce; Joey Chestnut battled heat to win Nathan’s contest; a California man pleaded guilty to fake ransom charges.

articles.title: Small businesses say they're having a good summer as Americans travel closer to home
articles.description: The reported boost to domestic tourism, though anecdotal, comes as higher airfares and gasoline prices have made vacations more expensive.

articles.title: Check E20 fuel-related issues with authorised auto dealers: ARAI
articles.description: ARAI says drivers suspecting E20 ethanol-blended petrol issues should visit authorised dealers; tests found 2–6% mileage drop, no engine problems.

articles.title: E20 gives 4% lower mileage but safe for engines: Experts
articles.description: E20 petrol (20% ethanol) is safe for engines but may cut mileage 3–4%, experts say; motorists advised to keep tanks 80% full to avoid moisture.
